app.title: SafeFlow
app.subtitle: Yield Agent
app.description: AI-powered DeFi yield management with on-chain security guardrails
app.setupWalletTitle: Create your first SafeFlow wallet before you deposit
app.setupWalletDescription: Deposits execute through a SafeFlow wallet. Open Settings to create one, then return here to continue.
app.setupCapTitle: Create or import a SessionCap for this connected wallet
app.setupCapDescription: Your wallet is ready, but there is no known SessionCap that authorizes this connected agent yet. Open Settings to create one or import an existing cap by ID.

chat.title: AI Yield Agent
chat.subtitle: Tell me your yield strategy in plain English. I'll find the best vaults and execute deposits securely.
chat.welcomeSubtitle: I discover, analyze and execute DeFi yield strategies — with on-chain spending guardrails.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask me anything about DeFi yield...
chat.sessionCapNote: All deposits protected by SessionCap spending limits
chat.setupWalletTitle: Create your first SafeFlow wallet before you deposit
chat.setupWalletDescription: Deposits execute through a SafeFlow wallet. Open Settings to create one, then return here to continue.
chat.setupCapTitle: Create or import a SessionCap for this connected wallet
chat.setupCapDescription: Your wallet is ready, but there is no known SessionCap that authorizes this connected agent yet. Open Settings to create one or import an existing cap by ID.
chat.setupReadyDescription: Your SafeFlow wallet and SessionCap are configured. You're ready to deposit.

explore.title: Yield Vaults
explore.subtitle: Discover and compare yield opportunities across 20+ protocols. Powered by LI.FI Earn API.
explore.loading: Loading vaults from LI.FI Earn API...
explore.noResults: No vaults found matching your criteria.
explore.emptyDescriptionFiltered: Try adjusting your filters or search terms.
explore.setupWalletTitle: Create your first SafeFlow wallet before you deposit
explore.setupWalletDescription: Deposits execute through a SafeFlow wallet. Open Settings to create one, then return here to continue.
explore.setupCapTitle: Create or import a SessionCap for this connected wallet
explore.setupCapDescription: Your wallet is ready, but there is no known SessionCap that authorizes this connected agent yet. Open Settings to create one or import an existing cap by ID.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: View your current yield positions and performance.
portfolio.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to view portfolio positions.
portfolio.dataSource: Data from LI.FI Earn Portfolio API
portfolio.emptyTitle: No yield positions found for this wallet.
portfolio.emptyReadyDescription: Your SafeFlow resources are ready. Explore a vault and make your first protected deposit.
portfolio.emptySetupDescription: Finish your SafeFlow setup first, then deposit into a vault to see positions here.

settings.title: Session Policy
settings.subtitle: Configure SafeFlow SessionCap parameters for your AI agent.
settings.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to manage SafeFlow resources.
settings.contractMissing: SafeFlow contract is not configured for this app yet. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SAFEFLOW_CONTRACT before continuing.
settings.executionChainReady: Wallet already connected to the execution chain.
settings.resourceCenterTitle: Create, import and reuse the IDs SafeFlow needs
settings.resourceCenterSubtitle: If a flow asks for a wallet ID or SessionCap ID, you should be able to create it here or read it back from chain. This browser keeps the resources you save so the next step can reuse them.
settings.stepCreateWalletDescription: A SafeFlow wallet is the on-chain container that receives funds before SessionCap-protected execution.
settings.stepCreateCapDescription: SessionCaps define which agent address can spend, with spending limits and an expiry timestamp.
settings.stepReturnToDepositDescription: Once a wallet and cap exist, Deposit can prefill them instead of asking you to interpret chain data yourself.
settings.librarySubtitle: These resources are associated with the currently connected wallet in this browser. Use them to fill forms, inspect caps, or jump back into deposits.
settings.resetLocalResourcesHint: Use this after redeploying the SafeFlow contract so stale wallet IDs and SessionCaps do not survive in local storage.
settings.localResourcesReset: Saved SafeFlow wallet and SessionCap data for the connected wallet has been cleared from this browser.
settings.noResources: No SafeFlow resources are saved for this wallet yet. Create a wallet, create a SessionCap, or import a cap by ID to build your library.
settings.noCapsYet: No SessionCaps are saved yet. Create one or import an existing cap by ID.
settings.createWalletDescription: Create a new on-chain SafeFlow wallet. The returned wallet ID is what later deposit flows need.
settings.walletCreated: Wallet created and added to your saved resources.
settings.txFailed: Transaction failed. Check your chain, gas and contract configuration, then try again.
settings.createCapDescription: Create a SessionCap for an agent address. If you already know a wallet ID, you can use it here without leaving the page.
settings.rawUnitsHint: Use raw token units. For USDC, 1 token = 1000000.
settings.capCreated: SessionCap created and saved for reuse.
settings.importCapDescription: If another flow gave you a cap ID, paste it here to read its wallet, agent, limits and expiry. You can then save it for later reuse.
settings.capNotFound: No SessionCap was found for that ID on the current execution chain.

vaultModal.capNotFound: No SessionCap was found for that ID.
vaultModal.capInactive: This SessionCap is inactive. Create or import another cap before you continue.
vaultModal.capExpired: This SessionCap has expired. Create or import a fresh cap before you continue.
vaultModal.capWrongAgent: The connected wallet is not the authorized agent for this SessionCap.
vaultModal.capReady: SessionCap is valid for this connected wallet.
vaultModal.savedResourcesTitle: Use a saved SafeFlow resource pair
vaultModal.savedResourcesSubtitle: Choose a wallet and SessionCap you already created or imported in this browser.
vaultModal.noSavedResourcesTitle: No saved resources are ready for this wallet yet
vaultModal.noEligibleCaps: You already have SafeFlow wallets saved, but none of the known SessionCaps authorize the currently connected wallet. Open the resource center to create or import one.
vaultModal.noSavedResourcesDescription: Open the resource center to create your first SafeFlow wallet and SessionCap, or paste an existing cap ID below to read it from chain.
vaultModal.capIdHint: If you know the cap ID, SafeFlow can read the wallet ID and limits directly from chain.
vaultModal.walletIdHint: This field is auto-filled from the selected SessionCap when possible, but you can still override it if needed.

hashkey.vaultSubtitle: Create vaults, deposit HSK, and manage funds
hashkey.sessionSubtitle: Grant and manage agent session permissions
hashkey.historySubtitle: Track payment intents and execution status
hashkey.hspInfoDesc: The HashKey Settlement Protocol (HSP) enables stablecoin payments on HashKey Chain. Configure your merchant credentials to create checkout links and receive webhook notifications for payment status updates.
